title: LR1110 peripheral emulation
description: Update LR1110.cs for full LoRa/GNSS emulation in Renode. Integrate with lichen-sim for nRF52840 + LR1110 boards like T1000-E. Address pinouts, SPI, DIO. HUMAN if board pinout unclear. Follow existing LR1110.cs and SX1262 patterns.
close_reason: LR1110 peripheral emulation completed with full integration. 3 clean codereview passes with all findings fixed and closed.
